scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.existsSync('package-lock.json') && fs.unlinkSync('package-lock.json'); fs.existsSync('yarn.lock') && fs.unlinkSync('yarn.lock'); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors yellow,cyan ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe Backend\\manage.py runserver" "pnpm --filter @workspace/tax-app dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
